headline: AT&T Stock: Is T Underperforming the Communication Sector?
summary: While AT&T has lagged behind the broader communication sector over the past year, analysts remain somewhat upbeat about the stock’s prospects.

headline: AT&T Uses Physical AI To Deepen Role In Supply Chain Data
summary: AT&T (NYSE:T) is expanding its collaboration with Wiliot Ltd. to support large-scale deployment of Physical AI in enterprise supply chains. The partnership moves AT&T beyond traditional connectivity into smart data services aimed at improving supply chain visibility and automation. The collaboration combines Wiliot’s battery free IoT ecosystem with AT&T’s network infrastructure and field capabilities for retail, logistics, and other sectors. For AT&T, this move ties its core connectivity...
